title: sphenomeris campylophylla
intro: Sphenomeris campylophylla, also known as the umbrella fern or umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the lily of the valley family (Podostemaceae). It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Sphenomeris campylophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
